# Real gateways send 2xxx farm-status codes during bootstrap.
# These are informational and must not block the session from reaching Ready.
handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260405 12:00:00 CET"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DU12345"]}
server api_error {"req_id":-1,"code":2104,"message":"Market data farm connection is OK:usfarm","advanced_order_reject_json":"","error_time_ms":""}
server api_error {"req_id":-1,"code":2106,"message":"HMDS data farm connection is OK:ushmds","advanced_order_reject_json":"","error_time_ms":""}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":1001}
server api_error {"req_id":-1,"code":2158,"message":"Sec-def data farm connection is OK:secdefnj","advanced_order_reject_json":"","error_time_ms":""}
sleep 500ms
disconnect
